filename: Deployment and Clinical Safety Maintenance Plan.docx
summary: This document outlines the clinical safety and maintenance protocols for KeepMeCompany's AI Intake Service intended for NHS GP practices. It details pre-deployment checklists, go/no-go decision frameworks, change management processes, and specific sign-off requirements for executive leadership. The plan emphasizes regulatory compliance, hazard mitigation, and incident response procedures.
